title: T-019 — LP state-transition service (block/unblock/destroy)
prompt:
# T-019 — LP state-transition service

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §6.1, §6.10 (FR-WH-035), V-WH-LP-007/010.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Generic `transitionLpState(lpId, toState, reasonCode, reasonText?)` service that enforces lp_state_machine_v1 guards, RBAC, and writes audit history.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-state-transition.ts`. Pull allowed transitions + allowed reasons from rule registry (T-013). Reject unknown transitions. Require reasonCode for destructive (block/scrap/destroy). Require role IN ('Manager','QA','Admin') for block/unblock per V-WH-LP-007. Insert into `lp_state_history` (or quality_status_history if QA-related) and update license_plates.status.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-state-transition.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/lp-state-history.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0NN_lp_state_history.sql [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/lp-state-transition.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given current status='available' and target='blocked', when called as Operator (no QA role), then it returns RBAC error per V-WH-LP-007.
2. Given a destructive transition without reason_code, when called, then service returns V-WH-LP-010 validation error.
3. Given a valid transition with allowed reason, when service completes, then license_plates.status updates and lp_state_history records (from,to,reason,user,timestamp).

## Test strategy
- RED: lp-state-transition.test.ts covers RBAC, missing reason, valid transition.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test lp-state-transition`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not hardcode transitions in client.
- Do not skip server-side RBAC (ADR-013).
- Do not bypass rule registry version v1.0.

pipeline_inputs.description: Generic LP state-transition service enforcing rule-registry guards, RBAC, and audit history.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server-driven allowed_transitions per from_state. RBAC for block/unblock per V-WH-LP-007. Destructive reason_code mandatory per V-WH-LP-010. New lp_state_history table.
out_of_scope: QA status changes (T-053 owns QA-specific UI; quality_status_history owned by 09-QUALITY)

Given a destructive transition without reason_code, when called, then V-WH-LP-010 validation error is returned
Given a valid transition with allowed reason, when complete, then license_plates.status updates and lp_state_history captures from,to,reason,user,timestamp
test_strategy: RED: lp-state-transition.test.ts covers RBAC, missing reason, valid transition
